readingOrder.emptyState: No chapters yet. Create chapters to set their reading order.
readingOrder.confirmMessage: This will reorder all {{count}} chapters based on act and storyline structure. Continue?
emptyState.title: Give your story structure
emptyState.subtitle: Divide your story into meaningful arcs — a beginning that hooks, a middle that builds tension, and an ending that resonates. Choose a structure that fits your story.
emptyState.hint: You can always customize the structure after creating it.
emptyState.template.three_act.name: Three-Act Structure
emptyState.template.three_act.descriptio: Setup → Confrontation → Resolution. The most universal storytelling framework.
emptyState.template.five_act.name: Five-Act Structure
emptyState.template.five_act.description: The classic dramatic structure: exposition, rising action, climax, falling action, resolution.
emptyState.template.heros_journey.name: Hero's Journey
emptyState.template.heros_journey.descri: The mythic quest in 12 stages. Perfect for fantasy, adventure, and coming-of-age.
wizard.customize.title: Customize your acts
wizard.map-chapters.title: Map chapters to acts
wizard.mapChapters.description: Drag your existing chapters into acts to organize them within your new story structure.
wizard.review.title: Ready to build your plot
wizard.review.summary: We'll create {{acts}} acts with {{beats}} story beats. Each beat is a plot point you can fill in as your story develops.
